title: alchemilla glaberrima var. incisa
intro: Alchemilla glaberrima var. incisa, also known as Lady's mantle, is a plant species belonging to the rosenaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing bleeding, and aiding in wound healing due to its tannins and flavonoids content. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla glaberrima var. incisa can be found in the form of tea, tincture, or topical creams, often used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
